title: Texture Pack Folders (Like Recursive Resources)
description: Mod allows folders with packs in them to work, mainly for organization. (Like recursive resources)
body:
This mod lets you place resource packs inside real folders within your resourcepacks directory, and they will still show up and work in-game. Unlike vanilla Minecraft, which ignores packs inside folders, this mod makes folder-based resource pack organization fully functional.

![Pack Folder Shown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a55be7177292250fcc0580c3434345f7b970bff.png)

![Examples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a35bd61aab3db9300f995afa758f778d093a3170.png)

![Pack Folders In](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd2ab261d6c63fdef228ececc0015f6a9570122b.png)
